lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਅਭ ਸਬਦ ਨ ਮਾਂਜੀਐ ਸਾਚੇ ਤੇ ਸਚੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin abh sabad na maanjeeai saache te sach hoe |1|
lines.english: Without the Holy Water of the Shabad, they are not cleansed. From the True One alone comes Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਿ ਝੂਠੈ ਝੂਠੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਸੂਚਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mukh jhootthai jhootth bolanaa kiau kar soochaa hoe |
lines.english: With false mouths, people speak falsehood. How can they be made pure?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਰਲੀਆ ਰਸਿ ਮਾਣਸੀ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਨੇਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pir raleea ras maanasee saach sabad sukh nehi |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Husband Lord enjoys her with pleasure and delight; she is at peace in the love of the True Word of the Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧੇ ਗੁਣਹੀਣੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਕੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: mundhe gunaheenee sukh kehi |
lines.english: O soul-bride, without virtue, what happiness can there be?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਪਰਦੇਸੀ ਜੇ ਥੀਐ ਧਨ ਵਾਂਢੀ ਝੂਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: pir paradesee je theeai dhan vaandtee jhooree |
lines.english: When the Husband goes away, the bride suffers in the pain of separation,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲਿ ਥੋੜੈ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਕਰਣ ਪਲਾਵ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jal thorrai machhulee karan palaav karee |
lines.english: like the fish in shallow water, crying for mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pir bhaavai sukh paaeeai jaa aape nadar karee |2|
lines.english: As it pleases the Will of the Husband Lord, peace is obtained, when He Himself casts His Glance of Grace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨਿ ਸੋਹੈ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਰਤੀ ਰੰਗਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan sohai man mohiaa ratee rang nihaal |
lines.english: The body is beautified, and the mind is fascinated. Imbued with His Love, we are enraptured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: pir saalaahee aapanaa sakhee sahelee naal |
lines.english: Praise your Husband Lord, together with your bridesmaids and friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਖੋਟੀ ਅਵਗਣਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman kaam na aavee khottee avaganiaar |
lines.english: The soul-bride is of no use at all, if she is evil and without virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ਸੋਹਣੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੇ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabad savaaree sohanee pir raave gun naal |3|
lines.english: Adorned with the Shabad, the beautiful bride enjoys her Husband with virtue. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪੇਈਐ ਸਾਹੁਰੈ ਝੂਠਿ ਜਲੀ ਵੇਕਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naa sukh peeeai saahurai jhootth jalee vekaar |
lines.english: She does not find peace in this world or the next; she burns in falsehood and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਵੰਞਣੁ ਡਾਖੜੋ ਛੋਡੀ ਕੰਤਿ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aavan vanyan ddaakharro chhoddee kant visaar |4|
lines.english: Coming and going are very difficult for that bride who is abandoned and forgotten by her Husband Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਢੋਈ ਨਾ ਲਹੈ ਛੂਟੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਸਾਦਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: dar ghar dtoee naa lahai chhoottee doojai saad |5|
lines.english: At the Door of His Home, she finds no shelter; she is discarded for seeking other pleasures. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਬੋਲੇ ਫਾਦਿਲੁ ਬਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: pir kai kaam na aavee bole faadil baad |
lines.english: She is of no use to her Husband if she babbles in useless arguments.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕੀ ਨਾਰਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੀ ਮੁਤੀ ਸੋ ਕਿਤੁ ਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: pir kee naar suhaavanee mutee so kit saad |
lines.english: The beautiful soul-bride of the Husband Lord-by what sensual pleasures has she been doomed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਕਉ ਮਤੀ ਦੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: an kau matee de chaleh maaeaa kaa vaapaar |
lines.english: They give instructions to others, and then walk away, but they deal in Maya themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਵਾਚਹਿ ਪੋਥੀਆ ਨਾ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: panddit vaacheh potheea naa boojheh veechaar |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, read their books, but they do not understand the real meaning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੀ ਝੂਠੀ ਜਗੁ ਭਵੈ ਰਹਣੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kathanee jhootthee jag bhavai rahanee sabad su saar |6|
lines.english: Speaking falsehood, they wander around the world, while those who remain true to the Shabad are excellent and exalted. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਜੋਤਕੀ ਬੇਦਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kete panddit jotakee bedaa kareh beechaar |
lines.english: There are so many Pandits and astrologers who ponder over the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਰਮ ਨ ਛੁਟਸੀ ਕਹਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin gur karam na chhuttasee keh sun aakh vakhaan |7|
lines.english: Without the Guru, they are not released from their karma, although they speak and listen and preach and explain. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਦਿ ਵਿਰੋਧਿ ਸਲਾਹਣੇ ਵਾਦੇ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaad virodh salaahane vaade aavan jaan |
lines.english: They glorify their disputes and arguments, and in these controversies they continue coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਨਾਰਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੀ ਮੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har var naar suhaavanee mai bhaavai prabh soe |
lines.english: With the Lord as her Husband, the soul-bride is happy; I, too, love that God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਮੈ ਗੁਣੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh gunavantee aakheeeh mai gun naahee koe |
lines.english: They all call themselves virtuous, but I have no virtue at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੜਾ ਨਾ ਵੇਛੋੜਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੮॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad milaavarraa naa vechhorraa hoe |8|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Shabad, union is obtained; there is no more separation. ||8||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਾਧੀਐ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਕੀਚੈ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam saadheeai teerath keechai vaas |
lines.english: You may chant and meditate, practice austerities and self-restraint, and dwell at sacred shrines of pilgrimage;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਕਿਆ ਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: pun daan changiaaeea bin saache kiaa taas |
lines.english: you may give donations to charity, and perform good deeds, but without the True One, what is the use of it all?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਰਾਧੇ ਤੇਹਾ ਲੁਣੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਜਨਮੁ ਵਿਣਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jehaa raadhe tehaa lunai bin gun janam vinaas |1|
lines.english: As you plant, so shall you harvest. Without virtue, this human life passes away in vain. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avagan tiaag samaaeeai guramat pooraa soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Renouncing wrongful actions, following the Guru's Teachings, you shall be absorbed into the Perfect One. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧੇ ਗੁਣ ਦਾਸੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mundhe gun daasee sukh hoe |
lines.english: O young bride, be a slave to virtue, and you shall find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਨ ਬੁਝੈ ਆਪਣਾ ਵਸਤੁ ਰਹੀ ਘਰ ਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: mool na bujhai aapanaa vasat rahee ghar baar |
lines.english: He does not understand his own origins; the merchandise remains within the door of his own house.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਰਾਸੀ ਵਾਪਾਰੀਆ ਤਕੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: vin raasee vaapaareea take kunddaa chaar |
lines.english: Without capital, the trader looks around in all four directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਵਖਰ ਦੁਖੁ ਅਗਲਾ ਕੂੜਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਕੂੜਿਆਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vin vakhar dukh agalaa koorr mutthee koorriaar |2|
lines.english: Without this commodity, there is great pain. The false are ruined by falsehood. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਉਤਨਾ ਪਰਖੇ ਰਤਨੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa ahinis nautanaa parakhe ratan veechaar |
lines.english: One who contemplates and appraises this Jewel day and night reaps new profits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਸਤੁ ਲਹੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਚਲੈ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: vasat lahai ghar aapanai chalai kaaraj saar |
lines.english: He finds the merchandise within his own home, and departs after arranging his affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਸਿਉ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vanajaariaa siau vanaj kar guramukh braham beechaar |3|
lines.english: So trade with the true traders, and as Gurmukh, contemplate God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: santaan sangat paaeeai je mele melanahaar |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, He is found, if the Uniter unites us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: miliaa hoe na vichhurrai jis antar jot apaar |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with His Infinite Light meets with Him, and shall never again be separated from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਆਸਣਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਚੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਆਰ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sachai aasan sach rahai sachai prem piaar |4|
lines.english: True is his position; he abides in Truth, with love and affection for the True One. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਸੁਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee aap pachhaaniaa ghar meh mehal suthaae |
lines.english: One who understands himself finds the Mansion of the Lord's Presence within his own home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਸਚੋ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sache setee ratiaa sacho palai paae |
lines.english: Imbued with the True Lord, Truth is gathered in.
